- My 8 units (Group A) are at (11,12), moving NE
- Enemy cluster 1 has 14 units at (8,23) - DISADVANTAGED ratio (8 vs 14), at THREAT distance
- Enemy Command Center is at (22,22) - my objective
- The enemy cluster is to my northwest, while the Command Center is to my northeast

The key insight: Enemy cluster 1 is at (8,23) - to my upper-left. The Command Center is at (22,22) - to my upper-right. The better play is to push hard toward the Command Center, moving northeast which keeps me away from the cluster centered around x=6-10.
